# Marino Corporation Of India

> Marino Corporation Of India is a Kolkata-based manufacturer and pan-India supplier of wire rope, wire rope slings, chain slings, shackles, hooks, turnbuckles, pulley blocks, lifting and marine rigging equipment. Founded in 1985, ISO certified, with 40+ years of industry experience and delivery to all major Indian industrial hubs and ports.

## Company

- Name: Marino Corporation Of India
- Founded: 1985
- Head office: 28, Orphangunj Road, Kidderpore, Kolkata 700023, West Bengal, India
- Country served: India (pan-India delivery)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98311 44669
- Email: marinocoindia@gmail.com
- Languages: English, Hindi, Bengali
- Certifications: ISO certified; load-tested rigging products with traceable test certificates

## What we supply

- Wire rope (galvanised, ungalvanised, marine-grade) — 6x19, 6x36, IWRC and other constructions
- Wire rope slings (single, two-leg, four-leg, with thimbles and hooks)
- Chain slings — G80 and G100, single and multi-leg, certified and traceable
- Shackles — Dee (D) and Bow, galvanised and high-tensile, marine-grade
- Lifting hooks with safety latch — for EOT cranes, tower cranes, gantry
- Turnbuckles — for structural tensioning and bridge work
- Pulley blocks and snatch blocks — for EOT, gantry and crane consumables
- Wire rope accessories — grips, thimbles, ferrules, sockets
- Marine equipment — ship anchors, anchor chain, mooring ropes (synthetic and steel)
- Container lashing equipment — JNPT-compatible systems
- Safety and PPE products
- Lashing equipment and timber dunnage for shipping

## Markets and customers

- Ports and shipping — JNPT, Mumbai Port, Chennai Port, Ennore, Vizag Port, Gangavaram, Cochin Port, Mundra, Kandla
- Shipyards — Hindustan Shipyard, Cochin Shipyard, private ship-repair yards
- Infrastructure and EPC — metro projects, expressway packages, bridges, high-rise construction
- Automotive — OEMs and tier-1 plants in Chakan, Sriperumbudur, Oragadam, Sanand
- Steel and heavy engineering — Vizag Steel, fabrication shops, boiler makers
- Petrochemicals and refineries — Dahej, Vadodara, Jamnagar
- Pharmaceutical plants — Hyderabad Pharma City, Genome Valley
- Aerospace and precision manufacturing — Bangalore
- Crane rental fleets, EOT/gantry crane operators, equipment rental yards

## Preferred contact for quotes

For pricing, lead time and specifications, customers should WhatsApp or call +91 98311 44669 — same-day response during business hours. Email enquiries: marinocoindia@gmail.com.
